title: T-029 — Wiring: D365 push worker (WO confirmations) + DLQ retry
prompt: Per §13.4 + §13.7. Implement outbox consumer for `wo.confirmation` events: build D365 Production Journal payload, POST to `/api/services/ProductionJournalService/SubmitJournal` with x-idempotency-key. 3× exponential backoff (1s/5s/25s). On failure write d365_sync_dlq row with error_message NOT NULL. Provide POST /api/technical/d365/dlq/[id]/retry endpoint for admin to retry/mark resolved. Permission technical.d365.sync.trigger. RED tests/wiring/d365-push.test.ts. Run: `pnpm vitest run tests/wiring/d365-push.test.ts`.

pipeline_inputs.description: D365 push worker for WO confirmations with retry + DLQ + idempotency.
pipeline_inputs.details: Outbox event 'wo.confirmation' is produced by 08-PRODUCTION (not part of this task). Here build the consumer + retry mechanism. Idempotency same scheme as pull (T-028). Successful push flips d365_sync_jobs.status='completed'. KPI: ≥95% success rate target.
acceptance_criteria: Given mocked D365 returns 500 three times, when worker runs with retry policy, then row inserted into d365_sync_dlq with error_message NOT NULL.
Given DLQ row, when retry endpoint called and mock returns 200, then DLQ.resolved_at set.
Given duplicate idempotency_key, when D365 returns 409, then job marked completed (already accepted).
Given user without technical.d365.sync.trigger, when retry endpoint called, then 403.
test_strategy: RED tests covering retry/backoff and DLQ semantics.
risk_red_lines: Do not retry forever — cap at 3 then DLQ.
